positive: A minimalist, abstract illustration of a cosmic animal companion, rendered in a strong, continuous black silhouette against a vibrant, gradient deep space background of sapphire blues and amethyst purples. The creature should resemble a fusion of a celestial fox and a manta ray, flowing gracefully with ethereal smoke trails. Emphasize clean lines, maximum contrast, and a highly graphic, bold aesthetic suitable for screen printing on apparel. The composition should be perfectly centered and balanced, with strong negative space around the subject. Style: Contemporary graphic novel, vector art, ultra-clean linework. Lighting: Dramatic and even, highlighting the silhouette's edges. Color direction: Monochromatic black subject against a luminous cosmic gradient.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, low resolution, grain, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, signature, copyrighted, photorealism
